serversCount: {count, plural, one {# server} few {# servers} many {# servers} other {# servers}}
providerUnavailableDescription: Failed to fetch server data. Check your connection or try again later.
emptyDescription: Connect a provider in settings — servers will appear here automatically.
startConfirmText: The server will be started. This may take a few seconds.
stopConfirmText: The server will be stopped and become unavailable.
restartConfirmText: The server will restart and be briefly unavailable.
